title: Delhi HC orders jails to use Aadhaar QR code scanning apps for faster release of prisoners who get bail
description: The Delhi High Court recently ordered all jail superintendents in the national capital to use Aadhaar QR code verification applications to speed up the release of prisoners who get bail. A Division Bench of Justices Prathiba M Singh and Amit Mahajan passed the order on May 22 after noting repeated delays, sometimes as long as over 50 days, in releasing convicts and undertrials after being granted bail.The Court also noted that a lot of time was spent in verifying the identity and
